arts.ttl: Arsenal v Brentford line-ups: Janelt in for Bees
arts.sum: Brentford make just one change from the side which drew with Chelsea – Vitaly Janelt comes into the midfield, with Yehor Yarmoliuk dropping to the bench. Gustavo Nunes, in the squad after his injury lay-off, is on the bvench. Arsenal: Raya, Partey, Saliba, Kiwior, Tierney, Jorginho, Zinchenko, Rice, Nwaneri, Martinelli, Trossard. arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Brentford - Premier League: Live score, team news and updates as Gunners look to close 11-point gap on leaders Liverpool but will they have one eye on their second leg against Real Madrid after midweek romp
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest score, team news and updates from the Emirates stadium as Arsenal host Brentford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'are preparing £35m bid for Real Madrid starlet' who has struggled for minutes under Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: Arsenal are lining up a £35million bid for a Real Madrid star who has struggled for game time under Carlo Ancelotti this season, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Real Madrid injury boost for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has on Saturday confirmed some altogether positive personnel news in his squad. This comes amid confirmation that Dani Ceballos is back available for selection.…

arts.ttl: Key players that will miss Real Madrid's second-leg Champions League tie with Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set be without several key members of their squad for next week's huge Champions League clash with Arsenal. The Gunners, who hold an impressive 3-0 lead in the tie following the first leg, also have plenty of injury woes but will be happy to learn of Carlo Ancelotti's woes.

arts.ttl: John Terry says there's 'no comparison' between Jose Mourinho's Chelsea and Arsenal Invincibles
arts.sum: Chelsea defender John Terry captained the side to multiple league titles under Jose Mourinho but the final season before Mourinho's arrival saw Arsenal go unbeaten

arts.sum: The Gunners believe they still have a chance of winning the title despite trailing Liverpool by 11 points

arts.ttl: Arsenal learn Real Madrid Martin Zubimendi transfer truth ahead of summer window
arts.sum: "In recent weeks, Real Madrid have been increasingly linked with Zubimendi, 26, who Gunners boss Mikel Arteta greatly admires," Chief football writer, John Cross explains. Arsenal's hierarchy could land another important victory over Real Madrid this summer as they move forward with plans to bring Martin Zubimendi to the Emirates .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed fresh Champions League setback as Arsenal 'learn' latest blow
arts.sum: Real Madrid defender Ferland Mendy will miss their second leg against Arsenal as Carlo Ancelotti's side look to do the unthinkable and turn around a three-goal deficit in the Champions League quarter-finals. "The plan has shifted from trying to have him ready for the Emirates to now aiming to have him fit for the Copa del Rey final in La Cartuja on April 26," he said.
